description: Porcelain enamel steel markerboard with magnetic facing
specs: 24 gauge minimum magnetized steel; Type A acid-resistant porcelain enamel finish; low gloss white/off-white; 3/8 in particleboard core; 0.002 in aluminum foil backing
constraints: One-piece boards with concealed fasteners; tight butt joints only if manufacturer size limits require multiple panels
notes: Basis of design: Claridge Series 8 LCS Porcelain Enamel Steel Markerboard or approved equal

description: Markerboard with permanent music staff markings
specs: Same markerboard construction as MB-PORC-8LCS; permanent music staff painted to markerboard surface
constraints: Provide only where drawings indicate music staff markerboards
notes: Vendor must identify product line and confirm permanent markings are factory-applied or otherwise durable

specs: 1/4 in self-healing cork composite bonded to jute backing; 1/4 in tempered hardboard backing; washable cork surface
constraints: Up to 4 colors selected by Architect from manufacturer full range; factory trim required
notes: Basis of design: Claridge Series 1100 Cork Bulletin Board or AARCO VIC Cork Series 10-013

specs: Manufacturer-recommended adhesive for full permanent adhesion; VOC content 50 g/L or less by EPA Method 24
constraints: Must be compatible with tackboard manufacturer installation requirements
notes: Quote adhesive or installation system separately if not included with tackboard

description: Integral map rail with cork insert for markerboards
specs: Integral head trim with map rail; cork insert color to match framed tackboard color selection; include end stops
notes: Basis of design: Claridge standard maprail or AARCO No. 10-124

specs: Solid ribbed blade-type marker tray; narrow profile; injection molded end closures
notes: Basis of design: Claridge blade-type marker trough or AARCO No. 10-122

specs: Aluminum spring-clip hooks designed for specified map rail
constraints: Provide 4 hooks per map rail at all markerboards
notes: Basis of design: Claridge No. 51M or equal

description: Aluminum flag holder for map rail
specs: Aluminum flag holder designed for specified map rail
constraints: Provide 1 flag holder per map rail
notes: Basis of design: Claridge No. 51FH or equal
